actions.title: Scope CAISO curtailment reduction package
actions.next_step: Design storage, flexible-load, and transmission screens around CAISO curtailment windows.
actions.rationale: CAISO curtailment is measured and decomposed into local and system causes.
actions.caveat: Dollar value is an annual-average-price upper bound, not realized market value.

actions.title: Prioritize reliability hardening in highest-burden states
actions.geography: USVI, Maine, Puerto Rico, Michigan, Kentucky
actions.next_step: Use EAGLE-I/MCC burden rankings to select outage-hardening and distribution-resilience targets.
actions.rationale: Outage customer-hours and hours/customer are directly measured from complete 2023 EAGLE-I data.
actions.caveat: Customer-hour burden is not monetized here.

actions.title: Target queue reform at IA-stage mediators
actions.next_step: Study IA-executed completion structure and failure-path IA statuses before proposing process reform.
actions.rationale: LBNL decided-project outcomes identify completion and withdrawal mediators.
actions.caveat: Mediators are descriptive, not causal proof.

actions.title: Validate proxy congestion value for PJM-NYIS
actions.next_step: Replace component-spread proxy with direct congestion-cost or flow-attribution evidence.
actions.rationale: The corridor has settlement congestion-component evidence attached to a structural bottleneck.
actions.caveat: Component spread is stronger than hub price evidence, but still not direct settlement cost.

actions.title: Validate proxy congestion value for CISO-SRP
actions.next_step: Replace component-spread proxy with direct congestion-cost or flow-attribution evidence.
actions.rationale: The corridor has settlement congestion-component evidence attached to a structural bottleneck.
actions.caveat: Component spread is stronger than hub price evidence, but still not direct settlement cost.

actions.title: Validate proxy congestion value for BPAT-CISO
actions.next_step: Replace component-spread proxy with direct congestion-cost or flow-attribution evidence.
actions.rationale: The corridor has settlement congestion-component evidence attached to a structural bottleneck.
actions.caveat: Component spread is stronger than hub price evidence, but still not direct settlement cost.

actions.title: Validate proxy congestion value for BPAT-NEVP
actions.next_step: Replace hub/price-spread proxy with nodal LMP or direct congestion-cost evidence.
actions.rationale: The corridor has measured price-spread evidence attached to a structural bottleneck.
actions.caveat: Proxy value depends on hub-to-BA mapping and should not be treated as direct settlement cost.

actions.title: Validate proxy congestion value for PACW-CISO
actions.next_step: Replace hub/price-spread proxy with nodal LMP or direct congestion-cost evidence.
actions.rationale: The corridor has measured price-spread evidence attached to a structural bottleneck.
actions.caveat: Proxy value depends on hub-to-BA mapping and should not be treated as direct settlement cost.

actions.title: Review BA footprint correction candidates
actions.next_step: Have a domain reviewer approve, reject, or defer rows in ba_review_template.csv.
actions.rationale: Machine validation reduces BA accounting/telemetry mismatch but still needs human approval.
actions.caveat: Not an official BA registration change until reviewed.

actions.title: Attach evidence to remaining structural bottlenecks
actions.claim_ids: congestion_bpat_nwmt; congestion_bpat_ldwp; congestion_tva_soco; congestion_miso_soco; congestion_miso_swpp; congestion_bpat_banc; congestion_soco_fpl; congestion_bpat_grid
actions.next_step: Pull nodal LMP, congestion-cost, outage, or planning evidence for the remaining corridors.
actions.rationale: Negative-curvature, high-flow ties are plausible congestion candidates.
actions.caveat: Topology-only evidence is not counted as measured waste.
